# Moreno AI Approval Queue — Message Schema

## File naming
```
/opt/moreno/approval-queue/pending/{timestamp}-{id}.json
/opt/moreno/approval-queue/approved/{timestamp}-{id}.json
/opt/moreno/approval-queue/rejected/{timestamp}-{id}.json
/opt/moreno/approval-queue/executed/{timestamp}-{id}.json
```

## JSON Schema

```json

  "id":                   "string  — unique, format: aq-{epoch}-{random4}",

  "vm":                   "string  — target VM name",
  "cmd":                  "string  — exact shell command to execute",
